name: repospec
description: A standard metadata format for AI agents to efficiently navigate and understand repository structure, architecture, and code organization.
summary: Specification and tooling for .repospec.json — a machine-readable index optimized for agent orientation and code navigation at the module/feature level.

entrypoints.name: generator
entrypoints.purpose: Reference implementation for generating .repospec.json from code

modules.purpose: Specification documents, examples, and design rationale
JSON Schema definition and validation utilities
Example .repospec.json files for different project types

patterns.applied_via: Use JSON Schema validator; see tools/validate/
Run generator on code to produce mechanical sections; merge with hand-written annotations

features.name: specification
features.description: Complete format definition with semantics and design principles

features.name: code-generation
features.description: Reference generator to produce mechanical sections from code

testing.unit: tests/ directory with validation and generation tests
testing.run: make test / (language-specific test runner once tool language is chosen)

dependencies.name: json-schema
dependencies.why: Validation standard; .repospec.json validates against JSON Schema

goals: Define a minimal, practical standard for agent-oriented repo metadata
Reduce agent time spent on blind search/scan in codebases
Provide tooling to generate and maintain .repospec.json
Enable agent-to-agent knowledge transfer within and across repos
